nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Mucegros was born in 1182, in Gloucestershire, England, his father, Robert de Mucegros, was 25 and his mother, Hilary de Foliot, was 33. He had at least 2 sons with Alice Dives. He died in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Mucegros est né en 1182, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Mucegros, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hilary de Foliot, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Alice Dives. Il est décédé à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Mucegros 1182 in Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Mucegros 25 und seine Mutter Hilary de Foliot 33. Er hatte mit Alice Dives mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb in Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Mucegros è nato il nel 1182 nel Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Mucegros, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Hilary de Foliot, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Alice Dives. Morì nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Mucegrosが1182年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Mucegrosは25歳，母Hilary de Foliotは33歳であった。彼はAlice Divesとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Mucegros(이)가 1182년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Mucegros(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Hilary de Foliot(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Alice Dives(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Mucegros nasceu em 1182, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Mucegros, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hilary de Foliot, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Alice Dives. Ele faleceu em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Mucegros родился в 1182 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Mucegros было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hilary de Foliot, 33. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Alice Dives. Он умер в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Mucegros nació en 1182, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Mucegros, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Hilary de Foliot, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Alice Dives. Murió en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
